data.summary: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate the presence of 'Code-based (CUSTOMER20) or automatic (happy hour pricing)' is not supported by the provided evidence. While the linked use case outlines the need for these discount types, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm their implementation. The prior step evidence does not include any details that would allow for a definitive validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of code-based or automatic discount implementations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of code-based and automatic discounts.
